content:
MODULE: cosmos.collaboration.sessions
FILE: cosmos/collaboration/sessions.py (731 lines)
CATEGORY: collaboration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Collaborative Sessions - Real-Time Collaboration

Novel Approaches:
1. Shared Context - Multiple users in same session
2. Real-Time Sync - Live updates across participants
3. Conflict Resolution - Handle concurrent modifications
4. Session Replay - Review session history

CLASSES:
- SessionState(Enum): Session lifecycle states.
- EventType(Enum): Types of session events.
- SessionEvent: An event in a collaborative session.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- SessionParticipant: A participant in a session.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- CollaborativeSession: A collaborative session between multiple users.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- SessionManager: Collaborative session management.

Features:
- Real-time multi-user sessions
- E
  Methods: async def create_session(self, name: str, host_id: str, host_display_name: str, require_approval: bo
  Methods: async def join_session(self, session_id: str, user_id: str, display_name: str, role: str='participan
  Methods: async def approve_join(self, session_id: str, user_id: str, approved_by: str, display_name: str) -> 
  Methods: async def leave_session(self, session_id: str, user_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def end_session(self, session_id: str, ended_by: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def send_message(self, session_id: str, user_id: str, content: str, data: Optional[dict]=None)
  Methods: async def perform_action(self, session_id: str, user_id: str, action_type: str, action_data: dict) -
  Methods: async def update_shared_context(self, session_id: str, user_id: str, updates: dict) -> bool
